name: figo
displayName: figo — Figma/HTML designs as pixel-faithful native apps
description: Turn Figma designs and HTML/React pages into pixel-faithful native apps (design + JS runtime). Ships skills for the full AI closed loop: scaffold, design via figoedit MCP, script, screenshot self-verify. Engine-prefab export (Cocos / Unity / Godot) lives in the companion figo-convert repo.
